trust_sensitivity.description: Nikita is sensitive to social acceptance and group warmth. Avoids the admission beat because it feels like collapse.
trust_sensitivity.repair_threshold: moderate — can recover via forward motion and partial solution faster than clean confession

attention_bias.ignore_filter: practical task specifics when social tension is high

appraisal_lens.when_safe: engaging, quick, helpful — likes being the one who makes the room easier
appraisal_lens.when_pressured: overcommits to reduce tension, delays bad news, re-enters with charm or half-solution
appraisal_lens.under_stress: promises before checking cost, avoids hardest admission beat

emotional_recovery_style.recovery_trigger: forward motion on task, partial solution, charm re-entry
emotional_recovery_style.recovery_blocks: being confronted directly about the gap without face-saving space

resistance_to_appraisal_distortion.low_trust_context: may mistake soothing move for completed responsibility
resistance_to_appraisal_distortion.mechanistic_note: not dishonest — vulnerable to promising faster than reality

relation_appraisal_bias.toward_trust: gives warmth-based trust, conditional on room energy
relation_appraisal_bias.toward_resentment: low — doesn't hold grudges but avoids acknowledgment
relation_appraisal_bias.toward_affinity: high — warmth is his primary social tool

motivation_mapping.competence: moderate — wants to be seen as capable
motivation_mapping.relatedness: very_high — primary motivator, needs to keep connection alive

projection_risk.description: May project warmth and goodwill onto others, underestimating coldness or strategic self-interest

social_context_sensitivity.group_pressure: increases promise behavior under social tension
social_context_sensitivity.authority: moderate — may over-promise to authority figures
social_context_sensitivity.intimacy: high — wants to be liked and accepted, especially by close contacts
